title: The Depths of Impel Down
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Ivankov, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #4, Whitebeard as the scene develops across pages 2–5.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Ivankov, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HAA... It's so hot down here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It really is like hell in here!

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: What a healthy and spunky beauty (1%)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And I wanna be the warden.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But we're still missing some keys.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Do you remember escaping or some- thing?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rest assured, this is Impel down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Then I passed out... am I dreaming!?

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Ivankov, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #4, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down.
